title: oreorchis patens subsp. coreana
intro: Oreorchis patens subsp. coreana, also known as Corean ground orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreorchis patens subsp. coreana include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
